description: Committed DEV calibration records loaded by the judge in dev/CI. Each record proves the judge MACHINERY (rubric → prompt → verdict parse → agreement) works end-to-end at agreement 1.0 against the dev-echo provider driven by scripted [[dev-llm]] verdicts (calibration/<rubric>/cases-dev.json). It is deliberately NOT a judgement of a real model — real calibration requires human-annotated cases scored by a real provider and is deferred to provider onboarding (evaluation.md). rubric_digest pins the exact rubric bytes; a rubric edit invalidates this record and the gate refuses to score until re-calibrated.
